testCases.title: Per-Product Loyalty Factor — Set fractional factor=0.5 and verify it persists
testCases.section: Loyalty > Product Points Loyalty > Product factors
testCases.evidence: Factor spinbutton shows 0.5 after Refresh. API /api/loyalty-program-product-factors/search returns factor:0.50 for productCode SEED-20260518-DELL-LAT-001-8-256 (id f08c9ee1-b005-414c-94d7-f213fe5fb63c). Save returned HTTP 204. No JS errors. No 4xx/5xx on save/search.

testCases.title: Per-Product Factor — No matching program/user-group falls back to default factor
testCases.section: Loyalty > Product Points Loyalty > Product factors
testCases.evidence: Opened 'Product points' program (id d78ae7a7) with UserGroupIsCondition scoped audience. Product factors blade loaded without error. Grid shows totalCount:2 (Hollister eGift GC863612 factor:1, Apple Gift GC952104 factor:2). Dell Latitude SEED-20260518-DELL-LAT-001-8-256 has NO factor row — confirmed via UI grid and API /api/loyalty-program-product-factors/search (loyaltyProgramId:d78ae7a7) response. No auto-created rows on load. No 4xx/5xx on page load. No JS errors.

testCases.title: Per-Customer-Group Factor — VIP-scoped program applies its factor to a VIP user; non-matching user falls back to default
testCases.section: Loyalty > Product Points Loyalty > User group condition + Product factors
testCases.notes: Admin UI portion COMPLETED: AGENT-TEST-VIP-Program (id 53bfe61f-8795-4370-953e-8f8251ada119) was created with UserGroupIsCondition='VIP', Store=B2B-store, and product factors for GC863612 (factor=1) and SEED-20260518-DELL-LAT-001-8-256 (factor=6) — both confirmed via UI and API (PUT /api/loyalty-program-product-factors/factors → HTTP 204). BLOCKED on cross-layer xAPI assertion: the LOYALTY_VIP_USER account (AGENT-TEST-vip@test.virtocommerce.com, securityAccountId 1dba59a3-7658-4b3f-9517-6549aebbf5b1) was swept between sessions (AGENT-TEST- prefix teardown). Platform /api/platform/security/users/{id} returns null — account no longer exists. Without a VIP-group storefront Bearer token, the xAPI products() loyaltyPoints assertion ([API] VIP user: loyaltyPoints.amount > base; non-VIP user: null) cannot be executed. Re-create the VIP user account to unblock: POST /api/members + POST /api/platform/security/users/create with userType=Customer, storeId=B2B-store, emailConfirmed=true, member groups=['VIP'].

testCases.title: Per-Product Factor — Delete a factor row removes the override
testCases.section: Loyalty > Product Points Loyalty > Product factors
testCases.evidence: Opened AGENT-TEST-ProductPoints-LOY026 program (id 72b9a853-299b-4003-828f-b3868c3ef9df). Product factors blade showed 2 rows (Dell Latitude factor=0.5, Extended Warranty SEED-20260518-WARRANTY-EXT-001 factor=2). Selected Extended Warranty row checkbox, clicked Delete in Product factors toolbar. Confirmation dialog 'Delete product factors — Are you sure?' shown; clicked Yes. Row immediately disappeared, badge updated to 1. After Refresh: only Dell Latitude row remains. API /api/loyalty-program-product-factors/search (loyaltyProgramId:72b9a853) returns totalCount:1, single result: {productCode:SEED-20260518-DELL-LAT-001-8-256, factor:0.5}. Extended Warranty row confirmed absent from API response. No JS errors. No 4xx/5xx on delete/refresh.
